from celery import shared_task
from django.conf import settings
import redis
import boto3

_redis_client = None
_ses_client = None

def get_redis_client():
    global _redis_client
    if _redis_client is None:
        _redis_client = redis.Redis(host=settings.REDIS_HOST, port=settings.REDIS_PORT)
    return _redis_client

def get_ses_client():
    global _ses_client
    if _ses_client is None:
        _ses_client = boto3.client("ses", region_name=settings.AWS_REGION)
    return _ses_client

@shared_task
def send_notification(user_id, message):
    r = get_redis_client()
    client = get_ses_client()
    client.send_email(
        Source=settings.FROM_EMAIL,
        Destination={"ToAddresses": [get_email(user_id)]},
        Message={"Subject": {"Data": "Alert"}, "Body": {"Text": {"Data": message}}},
    )
    r.publish(f"notifications:{user_id}", message)

def get_email(user_id):
    return f"user{user_id}@example.com"
